style: Bright child-friendly pixel art for story card cover illustrations in a cheerful English speaking practice app. Clear subject, full colorful background, readable thumbnail composition, saturated tomato red, sky blue, lemon yellow, mint green, white highlights. No text, no letters, no watermark.

assets.name: card-space-snacks
assets.description: A story card illustration about Space Snacks: a small astronaut, a cute robot snack box, floating star-shaped cookies and fruit jelly in outer space, readable at small size.

assets.name: card-daisy-diver
assets.description: A story card illustration about Daisy the Diver: a cheerful young diver exploring a bright underwater garden with daisy-like sea flowers, bubbles, and friendly fish, readable at small size.

assets.name: card-rocket-race
assets.description: A story card illustration about Rocket Race: a colorful rocket racing across a starry track with speed lines, tiny planets, and playful classroom game energy, readable at small size.
